# Transcrição: Find_people_like_you_who've_succeeded

- **Duração:** 01:20

## [00:00 - 01:20]

As a peyote fellow, having that typical Asian upbringing, what did you have to believe in for you to get out of that situation and be where you are in it? Thank you, Geoff. Straight to the deep stuff. I love it. First of all, I had to find other Asian people that succeeded outside of the areas that were the areas my mum and dad told me that I should have succeeded. And I had to seek out people who have done it. And my mum always said this and this worked against my mum. She always gave me this inspiration where she said, we're all made of the same stuff. Doesn't matter where people are from, doesn't matter where you grew up. We're all made of the same stuff. So if that person can do it, so can you. So for me in Australia, I was like, Mum, undo Vietnamese comedian. And then she was like, oh, and then it slowly opened my mind because I started to look for other people in the world that were off my background, that way it would do it. And that gave me the belief in the energy that, look, if that person can do it, so can I. And I had to really believe in that. At the moment I did, again, our beliefs dictate our actions, right? It changes what future we create. So for me, it was finding people who have done it that have a similar upbringing to me. And then I followed these people. I read their books and through learning with them. That's how I found that inspiration. Thank you, Geoff. It made me seem really deep. Thank you.
